description.zh: 文件按小组存放；展览首页把全部游戏平铺展示，并支持按游戏名搜索。
description.en: Files are stored by group; the exhibition homepage lists every game in one flat, searchable view.

projects.title: Sailer Game
projects.summary: The boat does not go where you point it. Learn to read the wind, trim the sail, and tack to the buoy.
projects.summaryZh: 船不会驶向你指向的方向。学习读风、调帆，并通过换舷到达浮标。
